title: Procgen Recipe
description: Tunable knobs for procedural dungeon generation (Pass 6). A recipe describes *what kind* of floor to generate — the generator interprets these knobs to produce a concrete tile grid, spawn, doors, and entity list.

biome.description: Biome key from biome-map.json. Determines tile palette, accent tiles, breakable set, and depth/contract.

faction.description: Faction affinity. Affects thematic entity choices (notice boards, faction banners, NPC spawn hints). 'neutral' = no faction lean.

primary.description: Primary map strategy archetype. cobweb = long corridors with chokepoints for spider deployment. combat = open rooms with sightlines and ambush corners. pressure-wash = winding connected paths that reward/punish route planning (kink-prone). fetch = tree-structured maze for timed sprint runs (DOC-113). mixed = balanced blend.

weight.description: How strongly the primary strategy dominates (1.0 = pure, 0.5 = half-mixed with fallback patterns).

style.description: Corridor shape preference. straight = direct connections. winding = longer S-curves (good for pressure-wash). l-bend = right-angle turns. random = mix.

width.description: Corridor width. 1 = standard chokepoint, 3 = wide gallery.

extraConnections.description: Fraction of extra loop-back corridors added after spanning tree (0 = no loops, 1 = all possible).

torchDensity.description: Fraction of eligible wall tiles that get torches.

breakableDensity.description: Fraction of room floor tiles that get breakables.

trapDensity.description: Fraction of corridor tiles that get traps.

cobwebSlots.description: Number of pre-placed cobweb tiles. 0 = let CobwebSystem compute at runtime.

enemyBudget.description: [min, max] enemy spawn count. Actual spawns are floor-data entities, not tiles.

decoyCount.description: [min, max] decoy containers (empty chests, looted corpses) placed in dead-end branches. Fetch strategy only (DOC-113 §6.2).

secondaryExit.description: If true, place a hidden secondary DOOR_EXIT in a non-critical-path leaf room. Fetch strategy only (DOC-113 §5.2).

entry.description: Which wall gets the entry door (STAIRS_UP or DOOR_EXIT).

exit.description: Which wall gets the deeper door (STAIRS_DN or DOOR). 'none' = dead-end floor.

bossGate.description: If true, exit door is BOSS_DOOR instead.

timer.description: Hero approach timer settings. Required for fetch strategy, ignored by other strategies (DOC-113 §2).

sentinelGraceMs.description: Milliseconds the hero stands at the exit door before switching to pursuit.

heroArchetype.description: Which hero archetype spawns on timer expiry. Determines suit, combat stats, and carnage behavior.

seed.description: RNG seed for deterministic output. null = random.
